resources.title: Rawkode Academy Courses Repository
resources.evidence_quote: You will find it at Rawkode Academy, which is the organization on GitHub. And then there is a repository called courses.

resources.title: Teleport Documentation: Database Access with Self-hosted PostgreSQL
resources.evidence_quote: Database access was self hosted Postgres. A lot of these steps are already covered here. This is where you find all of your answers.

resources.title: Beekeeper Studio
resources.evidence_quote: I'm gonna use Beekeeper studio. I thought it looked good. That was my reason for picking it. I thought it was the nicest looking of the clients I was playing with earlier.
